    Make an Appointment

    About Us

    Celebrating Our Heritage of Healing and Commitment to Excellences.

    we take immense pride in our rich history, our unwavering dedication to patient care, and our continuous pursuit of excellence in the field of healthcare.

    Welcome to Jinling Hospital , where a legacy of compassion, innovation, and expertise come together to provide you with exceptional healthcare services. At Jinling Hospital , we are dedicated to improving lives and ensuring your well-being through advanced medical care and a patient-centered approach

    Since our establishment in 1998, we have been at the forefront of healthcare, serving our community with unwavering dedication. We believe in the power of compassionate care, and it has been the cornerstone of our hospital's success. Our legacy is built upon the countless lives we have touched, the stories of recovery we have witnessed, and the trust our patients have placed in us.

    Jinling Hospital prides itself on staying at the cutting edge of medical innovation. Our team of highly skilled and experienced healthcare professionals, supported by state-of-the-art technology, ensures that you receive the best possible care. We offer a comprehensive range of medical specialties and services, from general healthcare to specialized treatments, all designed to meet your unique needs.

    Doctors

    Departments

    Research Lab

    Awards

    Services

    .

    Experience Comprehensive Care

    At Jinling Hospital , our general medical services are designed to provide you with primary healthcare and preventive measures. Our dedicated team of primary care physicians and nurses is here to address your basic medical needs, offer routine check-ups, and guide you towards a healthier life

    Specialized Medical Consultations

    Expert Care for Your Unique Needs We understand that some health concerns require specialized knowledge and expertise. Our hospital offers a wide range of specialized medical consultations, including cardiology, neurology, orthopedics, and more. Our team of experienced specialists is committed to diagnosing and treating your specific medical conditions

    Surgical Excellence

    Precision and Compassion in Surgery When surgery becomes necessary, you can trust our skilled surgical team. We provide a full spectrum of surgical services, from minimally invasive procedures to complex surgeries. Our focus on safety and precision ensures your peace of mind and a smooth recovery.

    Emergency and Trauma Care

    Jinling Hospital 's emergency and trauma care department is always ready to provide immediate assistance during medical crises. We are equipped to handle emergencies and critical conditions with a dedicated team of emergency physicians and state-of-the-art facilities, ensuring timely and expert care.

    Maternity and Women's Health

    For women's health and maternity needs, we offer a comprehensive range of services. From prenatal care to postpartum support, our skilled obstetricians and gynecologists provide personalized care to ensure the well-being of both mother and child.

    Diagnostic Imaging and Laboratory Services

    Accurate diagnosis is the first step toward effective treatment. Jinling Hospital offers advanced diagnostic imaging and laboratory services, including X-rays, MRIs, CT scans, and a wide array of lab tests. Our commitment to precision ensures that you receive the right diagnosis and treatment plan.

    Departments

    • Cardiology

    • Neurology

    • Hepatology

    • Pediatrics

    Cardiology

    Welcome to the Cardiology Department at Jinling Hospital , where your heart health is our top priority.

    Our team of dedicated and experienced cardiologists is committed to providing comprehensive and compassionate care for patients with heart-related conditions. With state-of-the-art facilities and a patient-centered approach, we are equipped to diagnose, treat, and manage a wide range of cardiovascular issues.

    Neurology

    Welcome to the Neurology Department at Jinling Hospital , where we are dedicated to understanding and caring for the complex world of the human nervous system

    Our team of skilled and compassionate neurologists specializes in diagnosing and treating a wide range of neurological disorders, from common conditions to complex and rare cases. We are committed to providing the highest quality of care to our patients while harnessing the latest advancements in medical technology.

    Hepatology

    Welcome to the Hepatology Department at Jinling Hospital , where we specialize in liver health and are dedicated to providing comprehensive care for patients with liver-related conditions.

    Our team of experienced hepatologists, along with advanced medical technology, is committed to diagnosing, treating, and managing various liver disorders. We offer a patient-centered approach that addresses each patient's unique needs, ensuring the best possible outcomes.

    Pediatrics

    Welcome to the Pediatrics Department at Jinling Hospital , where we are dedicated to the health and well-being of your children

    Your child's health and well-being are of paramount importance, and our Pediatrics Department is dedicated to providing expert care and support at every stage of your child's development. Whether you're visiting for a routine check-up, need guidance on child health and development, or require care for a specific pediatric condition, we are here to provide exceptional care.

    Testimonials

    What our clients says

    The doctors and nurses were not only highly skilled but also compassionate. They made me feel safe and well-cared for throughout my stay. I am truly grateful for their dedication to my well-being.

    Chenglong Huang

    Satisfied Client

    Their prompt and efficient service, along with their friendly approach, eased my worries during a challenging time. I highly recommend this hospital

    Meiying Xiaming

    Satisfied Client

    I cannot thank the staff at enough for their outstanding care. From the moment I arrived, I knew I was in capable hands. The facility is top-notch, and the doctors' expertise is impressive

    Xiaohong Chen

    Satisfied Client

    I had a fantastic experience. The nurses were kind and attentive, and the doctors took the time to explain everything clearly. I felt genuinely cared for throughout my treatment.

    Zhongming Li

    Satisfied Client

    The medical team's competence and the hospital's state-of-the-art equipment ensured a successful procedure. I am on the road to recovery, and it's all thanks to their expertise

    Wang Tao

    Satisfied Client

    Doctors

    we take great pride in our team of highly skilled and compassionate doctors. Our dedicated physicians are experts in their respective fields, each committed to providing the highest standard of care. With a wealth of experience and a patient-centered approach, our doctors are here to guide you on your path to better health. From routine check-ups to complex medical conditions, you can trust our doctors to provide the expertise and personalized care you deserve. Your well-being is our priority, and we are honored to be your healthcare partners. Learn more about our exceptional doctors and the difference they make in the lives of our patients..

    Gallery

    Step into the visual journey of Jinling Hospital through our gallery. We invite you to discover the heart of our institution, showcasing our state-of-the-art facilities, compassionate care, and the environment that fosters healing and well-being. Our gallery is a window to the world of healthcare at its best, where our commitment to excellence and patient-centered service shines through every image. Join us as we share moments that reflect our dedication to your health and the positive impact we create in the lives of our patients."

    Frequently Asked Questioins

    • Do you accept health insurance, and which providers do you work with

      Yes, we accept a wide range of health insurance plans. You can find a list of the insurance providers we work with on our website or contact our billing department for assistance in understanding your coverage

    • What services and specialties

      We provides a comprehensive range of medical services, including but not limited to cardiology, neurology, pediatrics, hepatology, and more. We offer a diverse team of specialized physicians and state-of-the-art facilities to address your healthcare needs.

    • How can I contact the hospital for general inquiries or emergency situations?

      You can reach us 24/7 for general inquiries via email.
